_doc: H1-vs-H4 divergence fixture. Root `top` has two subtrees that separate the critical-path criterion (H1) from the subgraph-cost criterion (H4). SERIAL branch `s_head -> s1 -> s2 -> s3` (all d=2): critical_path(s_head)=8, subgraph_cost(s_head)=8. WIDE branch `w_head -> {w1..w6}` (all d=2): critical_path(w_head)=4, subgraph_cost(w_head)=14. With theta_critical=6 H1 promotes s_head (cp 8>6) but not w_head (cp 4<6). With theta_subgraph=10 H4 promotes w_head (subgraph 14>10) but not s_head (subgraph 8<10). All other criteria held inert. The promoted EP sets thus diverge: H1={top,s_head}, H4={top,w_head}.
